Medium.msg: Warning: Corrective actions needed to prevent toxin buildup.

High.msg: Critical Risk! High probability of aflatoxin contamination. Intervene immediately.

rules.reason: Drying on bare soil exposes grain to fungi.
Re-wetting spikes moisture. Seek mechanical drying.
Feeding culls contaminates milk. Remove from feed chain.
Bags on the floor absorb moisture. Use pallets.

global_actions.disclaimer: MycoGuard provides risk screening, not lab testing. Always discard moldy grain from food/feed chains. Do not burn. Follow county public health guidance.
